hooks.command: BLOCKED=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('yes' if str(d.get('file_path','')).endswith('model.rs') else 'no')" 2>/dev/null); [ "$BLOCKED" = "yes" ] && { echo 'BLOCKED: model.rs is FROZEN per CLAUDE.md -- do not modify the Burn 0.20 architecture.' >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0

python3 -c "
import sys,json,os,subprocess
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
ti=d.get('tool_input',d)
fp=ti.get('file_path','')
if not fp.endswith('.rs'):
    sys.exit(0)
# walk up to workspace root (Cargo.toml with [workspace])
root=os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(fp))
while root and root!='/':
    ct=os.path.join(root,'Cargo.toml')
    if os.path.exists(ct) and '[workspace]' in open(ct).read():
        break
    root=os.path.dirname(root)
if not root or root=='/':
    sys.exit(0)
crates=['whisperforge-core/src','whisperforge-cli/src','whisperforge-convert/src','whisperforge-diarize/src','whisperforge-align/src']
paths=[os.path.join(root,c) for c in crates if os.path.exists(os.path.join(root,c))]
if not paths:
    sys.exit(0)
result=subprocess.run(['rg','^pub (fn|struct|enum|trait|type|const)','--type','rust','-n']+paths,capture_output=True,text=True)
open(os.path.join(root,'CODEINDEX.md'),'w').write(result.stdout)
" 2>/dev/null; true
